---
title: "OpenFoodFacts – Translation Tracker"
format:
  html:
    theme: none
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
    css: style.css
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <script src="https://cdn.plot.ly/plotly-2.32.0.min.js"></script>
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.8/css/dataTables.bootstrap5.min.css"/>
        <script src="https://code.jquery.com/jquery-3.7.1.min.js"></script>
        <script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.8/js/jquery.dataTables.min.js"></script>
        <script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.8/js/dataTables.bootstrap5.min.js"></script>
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: false

import pandas as pd
import json
from pathlib import Path
from collections import defaultdict

# ── Chargement des fichiers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
with open("categories.json", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    categories = json.load(f)

with open("translations.json", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    translations = json.load(f)

with open("wikidata_labels.json", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    wikidata_labels = json.load(f)

# ── KPIs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
kpi_categories = len(categories)
kpi_languages  = len({
    lang
    for c in categories.values()
    if "name" in c
    for lang in c["name"]
})
kpi_translations = sum(len(v) for v in translations.values())
kpi_wikidata     = len(wikidata_labels)

# ── Vue « Langues » – toutes les paires lang/label ───────────────────────────
lang_rows = []
for key, data in categories.items():
    if "name" in data:
        for lang, label in data["name"].items():
            lang_rows.append({"lang": lang, "label": label})

df_lang = pd.DataFrame(lang_rows)

top_lang = (
    df_lang.groupby("lang")
    .size()
    .sort_values(ascending=False)
    .head(15)
    .reset_index(name="count")
)
top8 = top_lang.head(8)

# ── Vue « Catégories » – chaque catégorie + ses langues ──────────────────────
cat_rows = []
for key, data in list(categories.items())[:800]:     # 800 lignes max pour la perf
    if "name" not in data:
        continue
    names = data["name"]
    langs = sorted(names.keys())
    cat_rows.append({
        "key"    : key,
        "fr"     : names.get("fr", ""),
        "en"     : names.get("en", ""),
        "n_langs": len(langs),
        "langs"  : langs[:12],                       # max 12 langues affichées
    })

# Trier par nb langues décroissant
cat_rows.sort(key=lambda r: -r["n_langs"])

# ── Sérialisation JSON pour injection JS ─────────────────────────────────────
js_kpis   = json.dumps({
    "categories"  : kpi_categories,
    "languages"   : kpi_languages,
    "translations": kpi_translations,
    "wikidata"    : kpi_wikidata
})
js_top15  = top_lang.to_json(orient="records", force_ascii=False)
js_top8   = top8.to_json(orient="records", force_ascii=False)
js_table  = df_lang.sample(min(400, len(df_lang)), random_state=42)\
                   .to_json(orient="records", force_ascii=False)
js_cats   = json.dumps(cat_rows, ensure_ascii=False)
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

# Injection des données dans le scope global JS
print(f"""
<script>
const KPIS    = {js_kpis};
const TOP15   = {js_top15};
const TOP8    = {js_top8};
const LANG_TABLE = {js_table};
const CAT_DATA   = {js_cats};
</script>
""")
```

```{=html}
<div class="shell view">

  <!-- ── HEADER ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <header>
    <div class="eyebrow">OpenFoodFacts · Taxonomy Explorer</div>
    <h1>Traslation <em>Tracker</em></h1>
    <div class="meta-row">
      <div class="meta-chip">
        <span class="dot"></span>
        Dashboard · Python + Quarto
      </div>
      <div class="meta-chip">
        Données : categories.json · translations.json · wikidata_labels.json · parquet OFF
      </div>
    </div>
  </header>

  <!-- ── FILTRE ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <div class="toolbar">
    <div class="tlabel">FILTRE</div>
    <button class="fbtn on"  id="filter-all">Tout</button>
    <button class="fbtn"     id="filter-categories">Catégories</button>
    <button class="fbtn"     id="filter-languages">Produits</button>
    <div class="tr sw">
      <span class="si">🔍</span>
      <input type="text" id="search-box" class="sbox" placeholder="filtrer…">
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ── KPIs ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <section>
    <div class="stats-row">
      <div class="sc">
        <div class="n g" id="kpi-categories">–</div>
        <div class="l">TAGS CATÉGORIES</div>
      </div>
      <div class="sc">
        <div class="n b" id="kpi-languages">–</div>
        <div class="l">LANGUES DÉTECTÉES</div>
      </div>
      <div class="sc">
        <div class="n a" id="kpi-translations">–</div>
        <div class="l">TRADUCTIONS TOTALES</div>
      </div>
      <div class="sc">
        <div class="n t" id="kpi-wikidata">–</div>
        <div class="l">ENTRÉES WIKIDATA</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- ── VUE « TOUT » + « LANGUES » ────────────────────────────────── -->
  <div id="view-langs">

    <!-- Graphiques -->
    <section class="grid2">
      <div class="panel">
        <div class="ph">
          <div class="pt">📊 Noms par langue – Top 15</div>
        </div>
        <div class="pbody">
          <div id="bar-top-lang" class="cw tall"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="panel">
        <div class="ph">
          <div class="pt">🍩 Répartition Top 8</div>
        </div>
        <div class="pbody">
          <div id="donut-top8" class="cw tall"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Tableau langues -->
    <section class="panel" style="margin-bottom:1rem">
      <div class="ph">
        <div class="pt">📋 Noms de catégories – toutes langues (échantillon)</div>
      </div>
      <div class="pbody">
        <table id="lang-table" class="dtbl display">
          <thead>
            <tr>
              <th>Langue</th>
              <th>Label</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody id="lang-table-body"></tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </section>

  </div><!-- /view-langs -->

  <!-- ── VUE « CATÉGORIES » ─────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <div id="view-cats" style="display:none">
    <section class="panel" style="margin-bottom:1rem">
      <div class="ph">
        <div class="pt">🗂️ Catégories &amp; langues disponibles</div>
        <div class="pb" id="cat-count-badge">–</div>
      </div>
      <div class="pbody">
        <table id="cat-table" class="dtbl display">
          <thead>
            <tr>
              <th>Tag</th>
              <th>Nom FR</th>
              <th>Nom EN</th>
              <th style="text-align:center">Langues</th>
              <th>Langues disponibles</th>
            </tr>
          </thead>
          <tbody id="cat-table-body"></tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </section>
  </div><!-- /view-cats -->

</div><!-- /shell -->
```

```{=html}
<script>
/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   DASHBOARD LOGIC
   ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

/* ── KPIs ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
document.getElementById("kpi-categories").textContent  = KPIS.categories.toLocaleString("fr-FR");
document.getElementById("kpi-languages").textContent   = KPIS.languages.toLocaleString("fr-FR");
document.getElementById("kpi-translations").textContent= KPIS.translations.toLocaleString("fr-FR");
document.getElementById("kpi-wikidata").textContent    = KPIS.wikidata.toLocaleString("fr-FR");

/* ── Plotly – couleurs cohérentes avec style.css ────────────────────── */
const COLORS = ["#60a5fa","#4ade80","#f59e0b","#2dd4bf","#a78bfa",
                "#f87171","#fb923c","#e879f9","#34d399","#38bdf8",
                "#facc15","#818cf8","#c084fc","#fb7185","#94a3b8"];

const PLOTLY_LAYOUT = {
  paper_bgcolor : "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
  plot_bgcolor  : "rgba(0,0,0,0)",
  font          : { color: "#e8eaed", family: "'IBM Plex Mono', monospace", size: 11 },
  margin        : { t: 10, r: 10, b: 40, l: 40 },
  showlegend    : false,
};
const PLOTLY_CFG = { responsive: true, displayModeBar: false };

/* ── Bar chart ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
Plotly.newPlot("bar-top-lang", [{
  x     : TOP15.map(d => d.lang),
  y     : TOP15.map(d => d.count),
  type  : "bar",
  marker: { color: COLORS.slice(0, TOP15.length) },
  hovertemplate: "<b>%{x}</b><br>%{y:,} labels<extra></extra>",
}], {
  ...PLOTLY_LAYOUT,
  xaxis: { gridcolor: "#2a2d35", tickfont: { color: "#9ca3af" } },
  yaxis: { gridcolor: "#2a2d35", tickfont: { color: "#9ca3af" } },
}, PLOTLY_CFG);

/* ── Donut ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
Plotly.newPlot("donut-top8", [{
  labels      : TOP8.map(d => d.lang),
  values      : TOP8.map(d => d.count),
  type        : "pie",
  hole        : 0.55,
  textinfo    : "label+percent",
  textfont    : { color: "#e8eaed" },
  marker      : { colors: COLORS.slice(0, TOP8.length) },
  hovertemplate: "<b>%{label}</b><br>%{value:,} labels (%{percent})<extra></extra>",
}], {
  ...PLOTLY_LAYOUT,
  showlegend: false,
}, PLOTLY_CFG);

/* ── Tableau langues ─────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
(function buildLangTable() {
  const tbody = document.getElementById("lang-table-body");
  LANG_TABLE.forEach(row => {
    tbody.innerHTML += `
      <tr>
        <td><span class="mono-tag">${row.lang}</span></td>
        <td>${escHtml(row.label)}</td>
      </tr>`;
  });
})();

/* ── Tableau catégories ──────────────────────────────────────────────── */
(function buildCatTable() {
  document.getElementById("cat-count-badge").textContent =
    CAT_DATA.length.toLocaleString("fr-FR") + " catégories";

  const LANG_COLORS = [
    "pg","pb2","pa","pg","pb2","pa","pg","pb2","pa","pg","pb2","pa",
  ];
  const tbody = document.getElementById("cat-table-body");

  CAT_DATA.forEach(row => {
    const pills = row.langs
      .map((l, i) => `<span class="pill ${LANG_COLORS[i % LANG_COLORS.length]}">${l}</span>`)
      .join("");

    tbody.innerHTML += `
      <tr>
        <td><span class="mono-tag">${escHtml(row.key)}</span></td>
        <td>${escHtml(row.fr)}</td>
        <td>${escHtml(row.en)}</td>
        <td style="text-align:center">
          <span class="mono-tag">${row.n_langs}</span>
        </td>
        <td>${pills}</td>
      </tr>`;
  });
})();

/* ── DataTables (initialisés une seule fois) ─────────────────────────── */
let dtLang, dtCat;

$(document).ready(function () {
  const i18n = { url: "https://cdn.datatables.net/plug-ins/1.13.8/i18n/fr-FR.json" };

  dtLang = $("#lang-table").DataTable({
    pageLength  : 10,
    lengthChange: false,
    language    : i18n,
  });

  dtCat = $("#cat-table").DataTable({
    pageLength  : 10,
    lengthChange: false,
    language    : i18n,
    columnDefs  : [{ orderable: false, targets: 4 }],   // pilules pas triables
    order       : [[3, "desc"]],                          // tri par nb langues
  });
});

/* ── Filtres ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
const BTNS = ["filter-all", "filter-categories", "filter-languages"];

function setFilter(id) {
  BTNS.forEach(b => document.getElementById(b).classList.remove("on"));
  document.getElementById(id).classList.add("on");

  const showLangs = (id === "filter-all" || id === "filter-languages");
  const showCats  = (id === "filter-all" || id === "filter-categories");

  document.getElementById("view-langs").style.display = showLangs ? "" : "none";
  document.getElementById("view-cats").style.display  = showCats  ? "" : "none";

  // Re-draw pour que DataTables recalcule les dimensions
  if (showLangs && dtLang) dtLang.columns.adjust().draw(false);
  if (showCats  && dtCat)  dtCat.columns.adjust().draw(false);

  // Re-draw Plotly si les conteneurs étaient cachés
  if (showLangs) {
    Plotly.Plots.resize("bar-top-lang");
    Plotly.Plots.resize("donut-top8");
  }
}

document.getElementById("filter-all").onclick        = () => setFilter("filter-all");
document.getElementById("filter-categories").onclick = () => setFilter("filter-categories");
document.getElementById("filter-languages").onclick  = () => setFilter("filter-languages");

/* ── Recherche globale ───────────────────────────────────────────────── */
document.getElementById("search-box").addEventListener("input", function () {
  const q = this.value;
  if (dtLang) dtLang.search(q).draw();
  if (dtCat)  dtCat.search(q).draw();
});

/* ── Helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
function escHtml(s) {
  if (!s) return "";
  return String(s)
    .replace(/&/g, "&amp;")
    .replace(/</g, "&lt;")
    .replace(/>/g, "&gt;")
    .replace(/"/g, "&quot;");
}
</script>
```
